task_a.split: random stratified by gold rating, seed=7
task_a.input_protocol: item_name only (gold review text NOT shown to the agent)
task_a.metrics_note: BERTScore unavailable on Python 3.14 due to torch wheel build failures; reported bertscore_f1 uses the token-F1 lexical fallback already in evaluation/metrics.py.

task_b.split: same-domain distractors (1 target + 19 random distractors from the same item_domain)
task_b.note: Task B numbers are identical across variants because the ranking path is fully deterministic; the LLM only contributes the conversational explanation. The below-random Hit Rate identifies a clear limitation: the hybrid scorer's interest-overlap signal is too narrow when distractors share the target's domain. Future work: LLM-driven reranking layer.
